reviews.review_title: Best game in the entire VR
reviews.review_description: This game is really really good￼￼ it’s all good like you mean good moderator, some hackers😭 but I was just asking if I can have finger painter cause I have over 50 subscribers and I joined the discord and I really really want to meet milk and this is the best game I ever played in my VR ￼

My friend got banned for acting like he had stick but it was just the Christmas ugly stick that anyone can buy and the mod that banned him was milk and i just met a modderater named bluebean told me he cant get banned for that and he also got banned by the same modderator milk by acting like k9 and also go banned by that but also i got my og badge taken away after i updated my game so can you please give me stick or my badge back?by the way great game

Got banned after 1 day of playing, what i got banned for? Whats what i wanna know i got banned for nothing, it just says "you have been banned from techno tag". A month ban without reasoning. And when playing you get kicked out the game when you go on slippery wall. This game sucks. Dont recommend

THE GAME IS AMAZING THERE IS CUSTOM COSMETICS CUSTOM 2021 XMAS UPDATE. Genuinely yall should play and there is some stuff what I find really cool like Lucy is still in game has longish arms for short arm people the community is great some can be questionable but still really fun game Most def a MUST PLAY. btw the discord is .gg/technotag or .gg/FXZctkCR

here some reason why you should make a moderator one I played really early on weekends when I mean early I mean I’ll be waking up around five or 4:30 AM I like playing early for some reason and number two some schools make you go to school on Mondays while my school. I don’t have Monday school so while 
all the moderators are at school ￼ I can take care ￼ besides I really like your game. I think you should fix how laggy it is. I can’t jump high that’s ￼ besides the point. It’s a really fun game. anyways please contact me back if you’re interested in a good moderator. ￼🙏😇
